data.title: TEST: Event Hero
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Default - No Excerpt","description":"Event with only title and start date. Excerpt hidden to test minimal display. No featured image, no venue, no external URL. Tests empty state handling for all optional fields."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/event-hero {"showExcerpt":false} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Full Content - All Fields Populated","description":"Event with featured image, start and end date/time on different days, venue, excerpt, cost, and external URL button. All optional fields present."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/event-hero {"showExcerpt":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Same-Day Event","description":"Event where start and end dates are the same day but different times. Date should collapse to show the date once with both times."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/event-hero {"showExcerpt":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Long Content - Edge Case","description":"Event with very long title, long excerpt, and long venue name. Tests text overflow and content resilience."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/event-hero {"showExcerpt":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"No External URL","description":"Event with all content fields but no external URL. Button should not render."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/event-hero {"showExcerpt":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->
